arts.ttl: Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson 'still angry' with sporting director after what happened after transfer
arts.sum: Former Roma sporting director Walter Sabatini has claimed Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson Becker is ‘still angry’ with him because of his transfer

arts.ttl: Arne Slot points finger at Mo Salah over Federico Chiesa's Liverpool problem
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has only used summer signing Federico Chiesa sparingly this season but the Dutchman says that is partly due to the phenomenal form of Mohamed Salah

arts.ttl: Agents contacted: Liverpool & Man City open talks over signing £50.1m wizard – Exclusive
arts.sum: The transfer race for Hugo Larsson’s services is expected to heat up in the upcoming summer transfer window. Sources close to CaughtOffside have confirmed that Frankfurt are already expecting offers for their 20-year-old star whom they value at the €60m-70m [£50.1m-58.5m] mark. arts.ttl: ‘Risk of mockery’ – Worry as Liverpool could snatch signing and make club look silly
arts.sum: Feyenoord’s Dávid Hancko recently revealed he’d held talks with Liverpool manager Arne Slot over a move to Anfield last summer. The transfer didn’t go through, but the Reds are still said to be interested in him. Slot has already managed the 27-year-old at the Eredivisie side and is a fan of his former player. arts.ttl: Liverpool receive triple injury boost ahead of Everton clash
arts.sum: Liverpool could welcome back three key players from injury for the visit of Everton in the Premier League on Wednesday. Alisson Becker was a doubt for the Merseyside Derby after suffering a suspected concussion while on international duty with Brazil.
